request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Your Turn: Practice & Preview. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Homework Assignment. Must show visually: **Homework**:; - Draw a labeled diagram of Photosynthesis in your notebook.; - Write the chemical equation from memory.; **Next Session Preview**:. Visual goal: Simple graphic of a notebook and pencil, with an arrow pointing to 'Next Session' text.. Teaching context: Assign homework and bridge to the next session's topic.. Student takeaway: Students know what to do for practice and what comes next (Transport/Excretion).. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any words, letters, labels, headings, capt...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
request.subject: Science (086)
